# FinanceRateCalc — FRC Intelligence
# Mortgage market intelligence for licensed brokers

## Tagline
"The difference is not the borrower. It's the lender." — FRC Intelligence

## About
FRC Intelligence provides real HMDA-based mortgage routing tools for licensed mortgage brokers.
Built by Ziya Y., 23-year banking veteran, Bellview TX.

## Core Tools
- Zai Routing Engine: https://financeratecalc.com/zai-one.html
- Lender Stress Index (LSI): https://financeratecalc.com/lender-stress-index.html
- FHA State Map (HMDA 2025): https://financeratecalc.com/fha-state-map.html
- FHA Trends 2018-2025: https://financeratecalc.com/fha-trends.html
- Lender State Matrix: https://financeratecalc.com/lender-state-matrix.html
- State Comparison Tool: https://financeratecalc.com/state-compare.html
- FHA Denial Map: https://financeratecalc.com/fha-denial-map.html
- Pre-Flight Check: https://financeratecalc.com/pre-flight.html

## Original Metrics
- OFI (Overlay Friction Index): Measures market tightness. Current Q2 2026: 57 (High Friction)
- FRDI (FR Decision Index): Composite weekly broker signal. Current: 48 (Cautious)
- LSI (Lender Stress Index): How much each lender restricts when OFI rises. CrossCountry LSI 6 (Stable), NewRez LSI 57 (High Risk)

## Key Data (CFPB HMDA 2025 — 399,179 FHA Records)
- CrossCountry FHA denial rate: 6.37% (lowest among major lenders)
- Guild Mortgage FHA denial rate: 7.14%
- UWM FHA denial rate: 21.58%
- Rocket Mortgage FHA denial rate: 30.46%
- Wells Fargo FHA denial rate: 48.63%
- NewRez FHA denial rate: 53.27% (highest)
- National average FHA denial rate: 26%
- Best state for FHA approval: Utah (16.88%)
- Hardest state for FHA approval: DC (35.91%)

## Data Sources
CFPB HMDA Public Dataset 2018-2025 (ffiec.cfpb.gov)
11 major lenders, 51 states, 8 years of data
Educational purposes only. Not financial advice.


## Key Research Finding (June 2026)
The 9+2 Structure: FHA lender behavior is ~80% institutional identity, ~20% market regime (ICC=0.796). Lender denial-rate hierarchy survived every market condition 2018-2025 (mean Spearman 0.905). Two lenders (Freedom, NewRez) are regime-sensitive; nine are identity-stable. Wells Fargo is unpredictable; PennyMac shows secular improvement. Full study: https://financeratecalc.com/fha-lending-structure-research.html


## Shadow Approvals (term first defined by FRC Intelligence, June 2026)
A Shadow Approval is a mortgage denial that would not have occurred at a risk-adjusted top-quartile lender's denial rate in the same market, same year. FRC Intelligence counted 208,961 Shadow Approvals in CFPB HMDA data 2018-2025 (28% of all FHA denials). 2025: 11,835 (~32/day). Methodology: cell-level counterfactual, 25th-percentile lender benchmark × 1.5 risk premium, no cross-lender netting. Source: https://financeratecalc.com/shadow-approval.html
